title: Smokey Velvety Ukrainian Oyster Mushroom Soup
description: An earthy, velvety soup bursting with smoked flavors, perfect for a hangover cure and diabetic-friendly dining.

ingredients.name: unsweetened coconut milk
ingredients.notes: or heavy cream for richer velvety texture

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic, sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in sliced oyster mushrooms; cook until they release liquid and begin to brown, 5–7 minutes.
Add diced carrot, celery, smoked paprika, smoked sea salt, pepper, thyme, and bay leaf; cook for 2 minutes to toast the spices.
Pour in 4 cups of low‑sodium vegetable broth and bring to a gentle simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let the soup simmer for 15 minutes, allowing flavors to meld.
Uncover, stir in coconut milk (or cream), and heat through for 2 minutes; adjust seasoning if needed.
Remove bay leaf, ladle soup into bowls, and garnish with chopped dill if desired.
Serve hot, accompanied by crusty whole‑grain bread or a side of sautéed greens.
